description: Pro features must be registered, gated, and admin-bypassed. Free tier: inquiries, events, clients, quotes, payments, basic calendar, basic finance, recipes, documents.

rules.description: Server actions for Pro features must call requirePro('module-slug') after requireChef()
rules.guidance: Check lib/billing/pro-features.ts for the slug. Add: await requirePro('slug') after the auth guard.

rules.description: Pages for Pro features must wrap content in <UpgradeGate chefId={user.entityId} featureSlug='slug'>
Every Pro feature must appear in PRO_FEATURES array in lib/billing/pro-features.ts
requirePro() and <UpgradeGate> automatically bypass for admins. Do not add separate admin checks.
